ar.en: Click on a core block to adjust the active core count.
Choose how much of your computer's power to allocate for flashcard generation. Higher profiles are faster but may slow down other applications.
Manually configure CPU thread allocation and memory constraints for processing.
Limits maximum RAM consumption during video clip encoding and extraction.
Choose the accuracy profile. Higher quality yields a better translation but takes more time.
Number of subtitle lines sent in a single prompt to the LLM.
Controls sentence flow by passing context between subtitle batches.
Number of preceding subtitle lines included for context continuity.
